last_blueprint_folder.description: Do not delete — stores the last-open blueprint book folder so the mod can restore it on load.

markdown_table_language.description: Initial Markdown table language for saves without Designer Toolkit settings state (0=English, 1=Local, 2=Both, 3=Hybrid).

markdown_number_format.description: Initial Markdown number format for saves without Designer Toolkit settings state (0=Auto, 1=English/en-US separators, 2=Local/current-language separators).

dtkSettingsStateJson.description: Internal per-save Designer Toolkit settings state. Editing may reset saved BDT settings.
